test-code.description: break directly in for loop body is a violation
continue directly in for loop body is a violation
return directly in for loop body is a violation
break directly in while loop body is a violation
break directly in do-while loop body is a violation
break inside if inside loop is not a violation
continue inside if inside loop is not a violation
break inside when inside loop is not a violation
return inside anonymous function inside loop is not a violation
continue as elvis right-hand side in for loop is not a violation
break as elvis right-hand side in while loop is not a violation
